question: Will the premium amount be deducted as a monthly EMI?
answer: If you've opted for insurance bundled with your loan, the premium has already been deducted upfront as a one-time charge from your loan amount. This means you don’t need to make any separate payments for it. However, if you’ve purchased insurance independently, the payment structure may differ. Depending on the plan you chose at the time of purchase, premiums could be charged on a monthly or annual basis.
